title: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE m (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t1 (i INT, j FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (i INT, k DATE);
ALTER TABLE m ADD COLUMN t1_id INT REFERENCES t1(i);
ALTER TABLE m ADD COLUMN t2_id INT REFERENCES t2(i);
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE causes crash
